modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help finding OneNote keyboard shortcuts

full_description_text: User looking for common shortcuts in OneNote. Can't find them anywhere. Need quick access to improve workflow. Please provide a list of shortcuts.
short_description: Need help finding OneNote keyboard shortcuts
description: User looking for common shortcuts in OneNote. Can't find them anywhere. Need quick access to improve workflow. Please provide a list of shortcuts.
